At the 97th Academy Awards , he was nominated for an Academy Award in the category Best Picture for the film Emilia Pérez . 5 His nomination was shared with Jacques Audiard . 6 7 8 Selected filmography edit The Beat That My Heart Skipped 2005 A Prophet 2009 Of Gods and Men 2010 Rust and Bone 2012 Dheepan 2015 You Were Never Really Here 2017 Emilia Pérez 2024 References edit
